description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior features large glass windows, especially prominent on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The building sits on a raised platform with a long, paved driveway extending from the front, and a secondary paved area to the side. The walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The structure appears to have a balcony or overhang above the main entrance, and the overall design emphasizes simplicity and geometric lines. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some variation on the side elevations.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a long paved driveway. The design is clean and geometric, with light walls and dark roof accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the long driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, the layered structure of the two stories, and the paved area extending from the side.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view showing the back of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a clear view of the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the symmetrical window arrangement and the full length of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
